name: CLR DLL Loaded Via Scripting Applications
notes:
This rule detects CLR DLLs being loaded by scripting applications.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: omkar72, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: DotNet CLR DLL Loaded By Scripting Applications
SIGMA Description: Detects .NET CLR DLLs being loaded by scripting applications such as wscript or cscript. This could be an indication of potential suspicious execution.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of [clr.dll or mscoree.dll or mscorlib.dll]
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(cmstp|cscript|mshta|msxsl|regsvr32|wmic|wscript)\.exe' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY CLR DLL Loaded Via Scripting Applications on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of [clr.dll or mscoree.dll or mscorlib.dll]
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(cmstp|cscript|mshta|msxsl|regsvr32|wmic|wscript)\.exe' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: CLR DLL Loaded Via Scripting Applications
Event description: Detects CLR DLLs being loaded by scripting applications.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
